name: Rapid Nutrition PLC
summary: Rapid Nutrition PLC, a natural healthcare company, researches, develops, and produces a range of life science products. The company offers meal replacement shakes, energy boosting tablets, weight loss tablets, and appetite suppressant powders under the Leisa's Secret brand; and high protein shakes, high fiber bars, organic multivitamins, fat burning shots, and grain granola cereals under the SystemLS brand. It primarily exports its products in Asia, Europe, Africa, the Middle East, North America, and Australia. The company was incorporated in 2001 and is based in London, the United Kingdom.
